docs.title: Welcome to the NICHY website!
docs.text:
The NICHY Consortium is an international effort to study neuroimaging correlates of central disorders of hypersomnolence. This website provides information on the team behind the consortium, participating sites, and documentation for the first analysis.

  • Team

    The people behind NICHY

  • Sites

    Overview of member sites

  • Projects

    Ongoing

  • Resources

    Helpful guides and tools

docs.title: NICHY Analysis Team
docs.text:

docs.title: Useful information for new sites
docs.text: Interested in joining NICHY? Please reach out to the working group chairs at yd.vanderwerf@amsterdamumc.nl and tt.dangvu@concordia.ca!
